'''Herstell V''' was a terrestrial astronomical object<ref name="HR" /> situated in the [[Herstell system/Legends|Herstell system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="TEA" /> It hosted the headquarters of the "[[Red & Black League]]," a criminal organization that was active during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] and was named after the [[Color/Legends|colors]] of<ref name="HR" /> the Herstell [[Star system/Legends|system's]]<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|other=[[Herstellic currency]]|system=[[Herstell system/Legends|Herstell system]]|legends=1}}</ref> [[Herstellic currency]].<ref name="HR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Herstell V was mentioned in the [[1995]] sourcebook ''[[Heroes & Rogues]]'', authored by [[Rick D. Stuart|Rick Stuart]] and [[Paul Sudlow]] and published for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="HR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Herstell system, and therefore Herstell V, in grid square N-12.<ref name="TEA" />
